prompt: In mobile view, when the hamburger icon is tapped to open the Robotics, Gaming, and Other sections, these items should remain visible without requiring a return to the top of the page, and a nicer font should be used. Currently, they are only visible when the page is at the very top.
summary: Zahtjev za prilagodbu mobilnog prikaza: vidljivost rubrika bez vraćanja na vrh uz bolji font.
raw: U monile view kada se pritisnu tri crtice za otvaranje rubrika Robotics, Gaming i ostalo, one bi trebale biti vidljive bez potrebe za vraćanjem na vrh stranice, uz korištenje ljepšeg fonta. Sad se to moze vidjeti jedino kad je stranica skroz na vrhu
